name: @brava/security-subgraph
description: Immutable on-chain screener subgraph for the Brava protocol. Indexes Logger events, AdminVault state, proxy upgrades and proxy-admin ownership changes across Arbitrum, Base and Ethereum mainnet.

scripts.codegen:arbitrum: pnpm run prepare:arbitrum && graph codegen subgraph.yaml
scripts.codegen:base: pnpm run prepare:base && graph codegen subgraph.yaml
scripts.codegen:mainnet: pnpm run prepare:mainnet && graph codegen subgraph.yaml
scripts.build:arbitrum: pnpm run prepare:arbitrum && graph codegen subgraph.yaml && graph build subgraph.yaml
scripts.build:base: pnpm run prepare:base && graph codegen subgraph.yaml && graph build subgraph.yaml
scripts.build:mainnet: pnpm run prepare:mainnet && graph codegen subgraph.yaml && graph build subgraph.yaml
scripts.build: pnpm run build:arbitrum && pnpm run build:base && pnpm run build:mainnet
scripts.deploy:arbitrum: pnpm run build:arbitrum && graph deploy --node https://api.studio.thegraph.com/deploy/ brava-security-arbitrum
scripts.deploy:base: pnpm run build:base && graph deploy --node https://api.studio.thegraph.com/deploy/ brava-security-base
scripts.deploy:mainnet: pnpm run build:mainnet && graph deploy --node https://api.studio.thegraph.com/deploy/ brava-security-ethereum
scripts.local:up: docker compose --env-file .env up -d && echo 'arbitrum: http://localhost:8000 (admin :8020) | base: http://localhost:8100 (admin :8120) | mainnet: http://localhost:8200 (admin :8220) | ipfs :5001'
scripts.local:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose --env-file .env up -d
scripts.local:logs: docker compose logs -f graph-node-arbitrum graph-node-base graph-node-mainnet
scripts.local:status:arbitrum: curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data '{"query":"{ indexingStatuses { subgraph synced health chains { network latestBlock { number } chainHeadBlock { number } } } }"}' http://localhost:8030/graphql | node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>d+=c).on("end",()=>console.log(JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(d),null,2)))'
scripts.local:status:base: curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data '{"query":"{ indexingStatuses { subgraph synced health chains { network latestBlock { number } chainHeadBlock { number } } } }"}' http://localhost:8130/graphql | node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>d+=c).on("end",()=>console.log(JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(d),null,2)))'
scripts.local:status:mainnet: curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data '{"query":"{ indexingStatuses { subgraph synced health chains { network latestBlock { number } chainHeadBlock { number } } } }"}' http://localhost:8230/graphql | node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>d+=c).on("end",()=>console.log(JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(d),null,2)))'
scripts.local:status: pnpm run local:status:arbitrum && pnpm run local:status:base && pnpm run local:status:mainnet
scripts.deploy-local:arbitrum: pnpm run build:arbitrum && graph deploy --node http://localhost:8020 --ipfs http://localhost:5001 --version-label v0.0.1 brava/security-arbitrum
scripts.deploy-local:base: pnpm run build:base && graph deploy --node http://localhost:8120 --ipfs http://localhost:5001 --version-label v0.0.1 brava/security-base
scripts.deploy-local:mainnet: pnpm run build:mainnet && graph deploy --node http://localhost:8220 --ipfs http://localhost:5001 --version-label v0.0.1 brava/security-ethereum
